description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build that runs on push. It has three jobs: test, build, and release. The test job runs on ubuntu-latest, checks out the repository, sets up Python 3.x, installs Poetry, and runs tests with pytest. The build job depends on test, runs on ubuntu-latest if the push is a tag, checks out the repository, sets up Python 3.x, installs Poetry, and builds the project with poetry build. The release job depends on build, runs on ubuntu-latest with write permission to repository contents, checks out the repository, sets up Python 3.x, installs Poetry, downloads the build artifact, generates a changelog, and releases the project to GitHub and PyPI.
